currentIssues: Narration is generated from slide titles and bullet text rather than a natural spoken script.
Demo sections explain features too generally instead of walking through app execution and judgment points.
Screen, narration, and subtitle timing are not yet managed as small beats.
The lecture needs separate modes for live lecture, YouTube video, and app demo clips.
targetWorkflow: Keep lecture source and large assets in their current folders.
Use PR Studio to manage project memory, spoken scripts, demo storyboards, TTS tests, render rules, and QA notes.
Create a spoken script layer before generating TTS.
Use beat-based demo segments with visible app action, narration, subtitle, and hold duration.
Record feedback after each render and fold it back into the project notes.
createdFor: Record how PR Studio should accumulate and improve AI Company lecture/demo production work.
